task_completion.description: Verifies the 'Encoding' routine is created with the suspect image and text for 3.0 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder showing an 'Encoding' routine tab. The timeline should show an image component (suspect.jpg) and a text component containing 'Study the suspect', both with a duration or stop time of 3.0s.

task_completion.description: Verifies the 'Delay' routine is created with a 5.0-second duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder showing a 'Delay' routine tab with a component (such as a blank text or ISI component) that has a duration or stop time of exactly 5.0s.

task_completion.description: Verifies the 'Lineup' routine contains 6 distinct image components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder showing a 'Lineup' routine tab with 6 distinct image components listed in the timeline (representing the suspect and 5 foils).

task_completion.description: Verifies the 6 images in the lineup are arranged in a 2-row by 3-column grid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Image component properties showing X/Y position coordinates that logically form a 2x3 grid, or a PsychoPy visual preview/layout window displaying the 6 faces in a 2x3 arrangement.

task_completion.description: Verifies a mouse component is configured to record clicks only on the images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Mouse component properties window in the 'Lineup' routine showing 'Clickable stimuli' populated with the exact names of the 6 image components, and settings configured to save the clicked name/state.

task_completion.description: Verifies the experiment is saved to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy main window title bar or a save dialog displaying the file path ending in '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/eyewitness/lineup_task.psyexp'.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show active interaction with the PsychoPy Builder interface (adding routines, editing component properties), rather than a text editor modifying a .psyexp XML file directly.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the correct asset directory for the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Image component properties or file selection dialogs should show file paths pointing to '/home/ga/Documents/TaskData/faces/'.

integrity.description: Verifies the experiment wasn't generated via an unauthorized script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands executing a python or bash script to auto-generate the psyexp file bypassing manual GUI creation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment must be saved exactly to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/eyewitness/lineup_task.psyexp. The lineup routine must contain exactly 6 images (1 suspect, 5 foils) sourced from /home/ga/Documents/TaskData/faces. The layout must be a 2-row by 3-column grid. The mouse component must be configured to only accept clicks on the 6 image components.
